notes: Source register. Each source class describes the type of evidence, its authority level, and use conditions. Do not invent permissions or commercial reuse rights.

sources.permittedUse: Human reference and verification. Republication requires explicit permission from each manufacturer.
limitations: Datasheets are version-specific. Superseded versions may no longer be accurate.
Application-specific datasheets may not represent all product variants.
Commercial reuse or reproduction requires individual manufacturer permission.

sources.permittedUse: Reference for safety, compliance and recall information. Link to original source. Do not claim to reproduce regulatory determinations as original NewBatteries content.
limitations: Regulatory data applies to specific jurisdictions.
Recall information may be updated; always check current agency records.
'No recall found' does not confirm a product is safe.

sources.permittedUse: Reference to standard designations and metadata. Full standards documents typically require purchase or licence.
limitations: Full standards content is copyrighted by the standards body.
Only publicly available metadata may be referenced without licence.
Standard designations may be amended or superseded.

sources.permittedUse: Human reference. Verify against manufacturer documentation where possible. No automatic republication rights.
limitations: Distributor specifications may differ from manufacturer originals.
May reflect regional or variant-specific product specifications.
Supplier rankings or commercial relationships must not influence compatibility ratings.

sources.permittedUse: Human reference for identifying potential cross-references. Cross-references must be reviewed against technical specifications before being used as compatibility evidence.
limitations: Cross-reference charts list potential matches, not guaranteed direct replacements.
May reflect manufacturer's own product range only.
Application-specific differences (chemistry, dimensions) may still apply.

sources.permittedUse: Used internally for NewBatteries platform records. Approved records may be presented as verified on the platform.
limitations: NewBatteries verified records represent the outcome of the internal verification workflow.
Records must pass technical review and conflict review before achieving 'approved' status.
Periodic reverification is required to maintain approved status.

sources.permittedUse: May inform draft records only. Must not be presented as verified without independent technical review.
limitations: User-supplied information is unverified.
Must not be used as primary compatibility evidence.
May contain errors, misidentifications, or application-specific data.
Personal data in user submissions must be handled per privacy policy.

sources.permittedUse: May be used to generate draft records for human review only. AI output alone is never compatibility evidence. Must not appear on public-facing pages as a basis for compatibility claims.
limitations: AI output is not authoritative evidence.
AI may hallucinate or misstate technical specifications.
Any AI-generated content must be reviewed and approved by a human before publication.
AI inference must be clearly labelled as such in any draft record.
